name: Male Pred Planet [VORE RPG]
description:
[CW: Vore, Digestion (Endo is also an option), Optional anal & cock vore, Male pred, Female prey, Scat disposal, Free-use]

Basically a whole world populated by countless cute curvy ladies, while the much smaller male population is able to snack on them without a care. You can either be part of the small minority of men with billions of women all equally ready to satisfy your appetite. Or be amongst said women, living life with the constant threat of being a meal. Have fun!

Update: Now the bot allows for preyPOV!

There is endo but there's no reformation in this, so good luck if you end up digesting some prey you've gotten attached to.

This bot is very heavily inspired by two bots made by @Jayden5678 and @Naomi7, so credit to them. However, the bot is more so based on Jayden's bot rather than Naomi's bot, as I mostly made this due to liking the general idea of that one and wanting to include some of my preferences 'n stuff. Both bots are linked here, so please consider checking them out!:

[Jayden's bot]

[Naomi's bot]

Pfp art is by GoldenKuji over on Eka's!

Check out the female version [here!]

My first public bot on the site, woo! I'd also like to hear any valid criticism you guys might have for me!
creator: JustAnother_User
